## Helpful Resources

Visit our [Glossary](https://www.grants.ca.gov/glossary/) for definitions of terms used to describe grant opportunities, or visit our [FAQs](https://www.grants.ca.gov/faq/) for answers to common questions.

## Refine Results

Keyword search: [More information about the keyword search\\
Search for terms included in the title and grant details text such as "climate change," "COVID-19" or "high school".](https://www.grants.ca.gov/?s&grant_status=open&grant_categories=science-technology-and-research-development,business-and-consumer-affairs#!keyword-search)

What are you looking for?

Apply

Filters

Show:

Forecasted

Active

Closed

Post Award Info Post Award Info
State agencies are required to provide post award information within a year of a grant closing (or every fiscal year for ongoing grants).

Do not show:

Loan Opportunities

Opportunities requiring matched funding

## Save your search?

Quickly and easily apply your current refinements to future searches (no sign-up or login necessary\*) by saving; we’ll provide a button to apply your saved search next time you arrive on the page.

Would you like to save the following?

Include:Forecasted, Active

Agencies:Any Agency

Category:Any Category

Eligible Applicant:Any Eligible Applicant

Disbursement Method:Any Disbursement Method

Yes, save my search
No thanks, don’t save

_\\* Search refinements stored via cookie; clearing cookies or browser history will remove saved refinements._
